text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
Red light!
Ha! I saw you move!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Ugh! I thought I had it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're so bad at this game! Of course you're
gonna lose if you move that easily.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
Who the heck are you?! Some kind of Red Light,
Green Light expert?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Duh! I'm the genius Magical Girl Sweepy!

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
W-wow! You were like a statue! How did you do
that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean how? When I decide not to
move, there's nothing that'll make me budge. It
doesn't matter how much you push or pull! ♪

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're awesome! Give me some tips too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Sure, I'm feeling super generous! ♪ I'll turn you all
into pros! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho gets so focused on playing with the
kids that she completely forgets about training.
